OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Devine is present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Margie Lariviere, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of Aug -06-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
